prompt: Write a short poem (8–16 lines) about the feeling of finishing a long project. Any form you like.
response:
The final keystroke clicks—
A sigh escapes my lips.
The labor of a year
Now rendered crystal-clear.

Each page a victory hung,
A bell at last well-rung.
In the wake of the last line,
Sweet relief, and rest divine.

The work complete at last,
My hands untie the mast.
And though the voyage was long,
My heart is flush with song.
